zh.Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Cromwell於1318年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾時，他的父親Ralph De Cromwell26歲，母親Joan de la Mare23歲。他於1335年與Baroness Avice Bellers在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1351年在英國諾廷加姆爾可納爾 托爾卡德享年33歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Cromwell于1318年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾时，他的父亲Ralph De Cromwell26岁，母亲Joan de la Mare23岁。他于1335年与Baroness Avice Bellers在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1351年在英国諾廷加姆爾可納爾 托爾卡德享年33岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Cromwell was born in 1318, in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Ralph De Cromwell, was 26 and his mother, Joan de la Mare, was 23. He married Baroness Avice Bellers in 1335, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1351, in Hucknall Torkard, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Cromwell est né en 1318, à Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph De Cromwell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan de la Mare, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Avice Bellers en 1335, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1351, à Hucknall Torkard, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Cromwell 1318 in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph De Cromwell 26 und seine Mutter Joan de la Mare 23. Er hat 1335 in Nottinghamshire, England Baroness Avice Bellers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1351 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Hucknall Torkard, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Cromwell è nato il nel 1318 nel Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph De Cromwell, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan de la Mare, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Avice Bellers nel 1335, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1351, nel Hucknall Torkard, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Cromwellが1318年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエルで生まれた時，父Ralph De Cromwellは26歳，母Joan de la Mareは23歳であった。1335年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでBaroness Avice Bellersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1351年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアハクナル トルカルドで33歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Cromwell(이)가 1318년 영국 노틴그함실르 크롬웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph De Cromwell(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de la Mare(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1335년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Baroness Avice Bellers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1351년 영국 노틴그함실르 후c널 토르카르드에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Cromwell, Southwell, Nottinghamshire, En: Cromwell, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Cromwell nasceu em 1318, em Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph De Cromwell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan de la Mare, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Avice Bellers em 1335, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1351, em Hucknall Torkard, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Cromwell родился в 1318 г. в местности кромвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph De Cromwell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de la Mare, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Avice Bellers в 1335 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1351 г. в местности хуккналл торкард, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Cromwell nació en 1318, en Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph De Cromwell, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan de la Mare, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Baroness Avice Bellers en 1335, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1351, en Hucknall Torkard, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
